Localization.Description: A user changed vault access rights

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} changed the access rights of private vault "{object.name}" to "{object.new_value}" for the user {object.account.name} in Passwork on host {event_src.host}

The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} changed the access rights of organization vault "{object.name}" to "{object.new_value}" for the user {object.account.name} in Passwork on host {event_src.host}
